title: October 13, 2014 – Jasmine Netsena
summary: Tahltan and Dene from Fort Nelson, British Columbia, Jasmine Netsena is a singer/songwriter whose music balances an American southern style with her northern upbringing. After many years in the making, her debut record “Take You With Me” won for “Best Folk/Acoustic CD” at the Aboriginal Peoples’ Cho...
